title: rubus hasbaniensis
intro: Rubus hasbaniensis is a rare and endangered species of the Rubus genus, commonly known as the Himalayan raspberry or Lebanese raspberry. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to protect against certain types of cancer. The health benefits of Rubus hasbaniensis include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain diseases, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Middle East and Asia.
